title: types: DeliveryReceipt deviceDeliveredAt, PresenceStatus receiptSharing
description:
## What
Spec changes (IMPROVEMENTS.md §4, §5):
- DeliveryReceipt: add device_delivered_at: Option<UTCDate> (optional; absent if recipient platform cannot confirm device delivery)
- PresenceStatus: add receipt_sharing: bool (default true); add to PresenceStatus/set

## Tests
Fixture tests/fixtures/types/delivery_receipt_with_device.json
Fixture tests/fixtures/types/presence_status_receipt_sharing.json
Assert: deviceDeliveredAt round-trips as Option<UTCDate>
Assert: receiptSharing defaults to true when absent
